description: THE GENERAL SCOPE OF WORK FOR THIS PROJECT IS TO RENOVATE AN EXISTING COFFEE SHOP AND GRAB IN GO ON THE 2ND FLOOR LOBBY AREA OF THE EXISTING HOTEL. MODIFICATIONS TO EXISTING SPRINKLER SYSTEM AND FIRE ALARM DEVICES WILL BE REQUIRED AS PART OF THIS PROJECT.
